name: ClimateWorks Foundation - Drive Electric Campaign
mission: ClimateWorks Foundation's Drive Electric Campaign is working to end the polluting tailpipe and accelerate the global transition to a clean transportation future, delivering massive benefits to the climate, health, and the economy.

name: Global Methane Hub
mission: Accelerate action by governments, civil society, researchers, investors, and the private sector to develop and implement strategies that will catalyze rapid systemic reductions in methane emissions in the energy, agriculture, and waste sectors.

name: Allied Climate Partners (ACP)
mission: Unlock sustainable projects and businesses in emerging economies with catalytic capital.

name: Community Land Rights and Conservation Finance Initiative - CLARIFI (An initiative of Rights and Resources Initiative)

name: Global Fund for Children
mission: Global Fund for Children partners with grassroots organizations around the world to help children and young people reach their full potential and advance their rights.

name: The Bridgespan Group
mission: We work to build a better world by strengthening the ability of mission-driven organizations and philanthropists to achieve breakthrough results in addressing society's most important challenges and opportunities.

name: Choose Love
mission: Choose Love is a global humanitarian organisation that raises funds and awareness to support displaced people, delivering rapid, flexible aid through grassroots partners and working to change narratives, policies, and systems so displaced communities can not only survive, but thrive.

name: ClimateWorks Foundation - Maritime Shipping Program
mission: ClimateWorks Foundation's Maritime Shipping Program works together with civil society, the private sector, and portside communities to shape the market and policy environments to help transform international shipping into a zero-emissions industry by 2050.

name: The Plastic Solutions Fund
mission: The Plastic Solutions Fund is an international funder collaborative dedicated to tackling the crisis of plastic pollution, which impacts the health of people and ecosystems all over the planet.

name: Prospera International Network of Women and Feminist Funds
mission: Our members redistribute resources primarily to the Global South and East, uplifting the voices, leadership, and power of diverse women’s and feminist movements. name: Center for Disaster Philanthropy (CDP)
mission: We mobilize philanthropy to strengthen the ability of all communities to withstand disasters and recover equitably when they occur.

name: European Climate Foundation
mission: Combatting climate change and its effects on societies and economies in Europe and worldwide, to ensure a healthy planet for current and future generations.

name: Women Win
mission: A future where every woman and girl exercises their rights.

name: ClimateWorks Foundation - Clean Cooling Collaborative
mission: Clean Cooling Collaborative's mission is to transform the cooling sector by reducing its greenhouse gas emissions and making efficient, climate-friendly cooling accessible to all.

name: Planned Parenthood Federation of America
mission: Planned Parenthood's mission is to ensure all people have access to the care and resources they need to make informed decisions about their bodies, their lives, and their futures. name: HIAS
mission: Drawing on our Jewish values and history, HIAS provides vital services to refugees and asylum seekers around the world and advocates for their fundamental rights so they can rebuild their lives.

name: Ocean Resilience & Climate Alliance
mission: The Ocean Resilience and Climate Alliance (ORCA) mobilizes and aligns global philanthropy to accelerate ocean-based climate solutions.

name: Urgent Action Fund for Women's Human Rights
mission: The Urgent Action Funds support the resilience of women and LBTQI+ human rights defenders through rapid and responsive grantmaking globally. We are four Sister Funds, rooted in our regions and connected globally, working to sustain feminist movements so that people and planet flourish.

name: Mama Cash
mission: Courageous women’s, girls’, and trans and intersex people’s human rights organisations worldwide need funding and supportive networks in order to grow and transform their communities. name: Landesa
mission: Landesa champions and works to secure land rights for millions of the world's poorest, mostly rural women and men, to provide opportunity and promote social justice.

name: Climate Lead
mission: Climate Lead empowers philanthropic leaders everywhere to take immediate and far-reaching climate action. name: Climate Breakthrough

name: Fund for Global Human Rights
mission: We invest in the power of human rights activism to expand justice, dignity and fundamental freedoms. name: Global Industry Hub
mission: Global Industry Hub offers the platform for collaboration on industrial decarbonization innovation, investment, and impact for funders and pioneering leaders. It drives system change by playing critical roles as strategist and thought partner, convenor and elevator, and catalyst.

name: Woodwell Climate Research Center
mission: Woodwell Climate Research Center conducts science for solutions at the nexus of climate, people, and nature. We partner with leaders and communities for just, meaningful impact to address the climate crisis.

name: Crisis Text Line
mission: We envision an empathetic world where nobody feels alone. At the intersection of empathy and innovation - we promote mental well-being for people wherever they are. name: Global Greengrants Fund
mission: Global Greengrants Fund mobilizes resources for communities worldwide to protect our shared planet and work toward a more equitable world.

name: Global Fund for Community Foundations
mission: The GFCF is the only organization working globally to strengthen community philanthropy through grantmaking, networking and evidence-based learning. name: Grassroots International
mission: Our mission is to connect people in the US with global movements that defend land, territory, water, food, seeds and the earth. Together, we address the root causes of injustice, and build alternatives that nurture human rights, ecological justice, and liberation - through grantmaking, social action

name: MADRE
mission: MADRE works toward a world where women and people who are marginalized fully participate in shaping policies and decision making, their expertise and leadership is recognized and upheld, and they equitably hold power and resources within their communities.

name: BRAC - Ultra-Poor Graduation Initiatives
mission: BRAC is a leading international nonprofit with a mission to empower people and communities in situations of poverty, illiteracy, disease, and social injustice. We design proven, scalable solutions that equip people with the support, skills, and confidence they need to lift themselves out of poverty

name: Habitat for Humanity International
mission: Seeking to put God's love into action, Habitat for Humanity brings people together to build homes, communities and hope.

name: Faith in Action Network
mission: We believe in a society free of economic oppression, racism and discrimination in which every person lives in a safe and healthy environment, is respected and included, and has agency over the decisions that shape their lives.

name: Women's Refugee Commission
mission: The Women’s Refugee’s Commission seeks to improve the lives and protect the rights of women, children, youth, and other people who are often overlooked, undervalued, and underserved in humanitarian responses to displacement and crises.

name: Meharry Medical College
mission: Meharry Medical College is a global academic health sciences center advancing health equity through innovative research, transformative education, exceptional and compassionate health services and policy-influencing thought leadership.  True to its legacy, Meharry empowers diverse populations to imp

name: FRIDA | The Young Feminist Fund
mission: FRIDA provides young feminist organizers with the resources they need to amplify their voices and bring attention to the social justice issues they care about, and the support, flexibility and network to keep their vision and influence alive. name: Digital Promise
mission: Digital Promise shapes the future of learning and advances equitable education systems by bringing together solutions across research, practice, and technology.

name: Broward College
mission: Transforming students' lives and enriching our diverse community through academic excellence, innovation, and meaningful career opportunities.

name: NGOsource
mission: NGOsource is a program of TechSoup established in partnership with the Council on Foundations that streamlines international due diligence for funders and strengthens the capacity of local organizations.

name: Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors
mission: Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors accelerates philanthropy in pursuit of a just world.

name: The Nature Conservancy - Blue Bonds
mission: The mission of The Nature Conservancy is to conserve the lands and waters on which all life depends. Our vision is a world where the diversity of life thrives, and people act to conserve nature for its own sake and its ability to fulfill our needs and enrich our lives.

name: United Way Worldwide
mission: United Way seeks to improve lives by mobilizing the caring power of communities around the world to advance the common good. United Way brings people together to build strong, equitable communities where everyone can thrive.

name: Room to Read
mission: Room to Read transforms the lives of millions of children through education, creating a world free from illiteracy and gender inequality.

name: Girl Scouts of the USA
mission: Girl Scouting builds girls of courage, confidence and character who make the world a better place.

name: Candid
mission: Candid's mission is to get you the information you need to do good.

name: The Guttmacher Institute
mission: The Guttmacher Institute is a leading research and policy organization committed to advancing sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR) worldwide. name: Climate Justice Resilience Fund
mission: To empower women, youth, and Indigenous Peoples on the front lines of climate change to create and share their own solutions for resilience.

name: Women in Informal Employment: Globalizing and Organizing (WIEGO)
mission: Women in Informal Employment: Globalizing and Organizing (WIEGO) is a global network dedicated to improving the working conditions of the working poor - especially women - in the informal economy. We strive for equal economic opportunities, rights, protection and voice for all workers.

name: GivingTuesday
mission: GivingTuesday is a Movement that Unleashes the Power of Radical Generosity Around the World. GivingTuesday reimagines a world built upon shared humanity and generosity. name: UMI Fund
mission: UMI Fund helps build a global movement for fast and fair climate action. We support, incubate and scale strategic, justice-centred climate initiatives, fostering collaboration between movements and philanthropy to drive disruptive, community-led mitigation and strengthen collective impact.
